title: Junior Instructional Designer at Schoolnet India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Schoolnet India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Join the Schoolnet India Advisory Limited family as a Instructional Designer in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Schoolnet India Advisory Limited:
Schoolnet India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India Advisory Limited!
